The '''Freighter Type K''' was a medium-sized cargo [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] manufactured by [[JenAni Systems Inc.]] Its design was configurable into a multitude of settings, allowing it to transport a wide variety of [[Xizor cargo container]]s in considerable numbers. This was the premier JSI model freighter, and drew respectable attention in a market already dominated by other manufacturers, such as [[Phylon Freight/Legends|Phylon Freight]], [[Damorian Manufacturing Corporation/Legends|Damorian Manufacturing Corporation]], and [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]]. Unarmed and only lightly armored, the Type K was best deployed as part of a convoy, as its maximum speed was easily outclassed by even the most primitive [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]].

[[Kyle Katarn]] was forced to fight his way through a Type K while trying to get aboard the ''[[Sulon Star]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II]]'' {{1st}}
